---
name: "Species request / Запрос нового вида"
about: "Request support for a new animal species (formula + life stages)"
title: "[species] "
labels: ["species", "research-needed", "triage"]
assignees: []
---

<!--
PawClock requires a peer-reviewed or veterinary-organization source for every
species formula. Issues without a citation will be marked needs-info.
-->

**Вид (русский) / Species (Russian):**
**Species (English):**
**Научное название / Scientific name (Latin):**
<!-- e.g. Canis lupus familiaris -->

**Зачем нужен этот вид / Why does PawClock need this species?**
<!-- popularity, regional relevance, user demand, etc. -->


**Формула расчёта возраста / Aging formula**
<!-- Either an explicit equation or a table. -->


**Источник формулы / Source of formula** (обязательно / required)
- [ ] Peer-reviewed paper (укажите DOI / provide DOI)
- [ ] Veterinary organisation guideline (AAHA, AAFP, ESVCN, ...)
- [ ] Standard reference textbook (с ISBN / with ISBN)
- [ ] Other (опишите / describe)

**Ссылка / Link or DOI:**


**Стадии жизни / Life stages**
<!-- e.g. for dog: Puppy, YoungAdult, MatureAdult, Senior, EndOfLife with age boundaries -->

| Stage | Range (years) | Notes |
|-------|---------------|-------|
|       |               |       |

**Ожидаемая продолжительность жизни / Expected lifespan range:**


**Сезонные/средовые поправки / Environmental modifiers**
<!-- e.g. outdoor vs indoor, large vs small breed, water temperature for fish -->


**Care recommendations sources**
<!-- Citations for nutrition, activity, vet-check frequency, dental, warning signs. -->


**Дополнительные замечания / Additional notes**
